title: aster senecioides
intro: Aster senecioides, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the western and central parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Groundsel include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. Groundsel can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
